name: pin_tier4_spray_sw_inventory_tags_four_controls
description: RE-RECORDED 2026-06-10 as the regression-gate proof of the Tier 4 full child fan-out. The 2026-06-07 'spray fix' narrowed two things together: (a) EVIDENCE_TYPE_TO_CONTROLS['sw_inventory'] to ['cm-8'] only, and (b) per-Control primary-CCI selection. Both were REVERTED 2026-06-10: (a) sw_inventory maps back to ['cm-8','cm-7.5','cm-10','cm-11'] — a software inventory is corroborating evidence for component inventory (CM-8), authorized-software (CM-7(5)), usage restrictions (CM-10), and user-installed software (CM-11); (b) the evidence-type match fans out to EVERY child CCI of each mapped Control, because the assess loop is per-CCI and primary-CCI-only tagging starved the siblings. Each of the four controls here has one child, so this xlsx upload yields FOUR tags (CCI-000363 / CCI-001774 / CCI-000877 / CCI-001812) at the flat Tier 4 relevance 0.8 / confidence 0.6. Regression-gate target: re-narrowing EVIDENCE_TYPE_TO_CONTROLS['sw_inventory'] OR re-introducing primary-CCI-only selection collapses this from 4 tags and trips the case.
